title: Fix embed.js build failure — localEmbed import does not exist in agentic-embed
description:
BUILD IS BROKEN. src/runtime/embed.js line 1 imports { localEmbed as agenticEmbed } from 'agentic-embed' but agentic-embed does not export 'localEmbed'. This breaks the package entry point (src/index.js → embed.js).

Error from build check:
```
SyntaxError: The requested module 'agentic-embed' does not provide an export named 'localEmbed'
```

Fix: Check what agentic-embed actually exports and update the import in src/runtime/embed.js to use the correct export name. Tests pass because they mock this module, but the real build fails.

This is P0 — the package cannot be required until this is fixed.
